description: Performance benchmark plan -- procedure for benchmarking a 60-second, 30fps, 6-plane video at 1920x1080. Per-frame timing measurement, software WebGL vs GPU acceleration comparison, identification of bottlenecks (capture time, encode time, render time). Covers C-08 (under 15 minutes on 4-core VPS) and TC-02 (under 500ms per frame with software WebGL).
notes: Tier 6 validation plan. Covers C-08 and TC-02. Delivers benchmark runner module (src/benchmark/runner.ts) with self-contained reference manifest using stage geometry, zlib-generated test PNGs, per-frame timing collection, statistical percentiles, and C-08/TC-02 compliance assessment.
